modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access course materials in Desire2Learn.

full_description_text:  
I am experiencing an issue while trying to view important course materials, including the Welcome Letter, Syllabus, and Course Schedule in Desire2Learn. Each time I attempt to access these resources, I receive an error message stating that I am not authorized to view the page. This situation is preventing me from obtaining essential information for my course, and I am unsure why I am encountering this access issue.
short_description: Unable to access course materials in Desire2Learn.
